positive: A stylized geometric representation of a cosmic nebula and constellation map, featuring deep indigo, sapphire, gold, and teal accents. The central subject is a highly stylized, abstract arrangement of interconnected stars and flowing nebulous gas clouds, forming a cohesive circular or shield-like shape. The composition must be centered, symmetrical, and designed exclusively for a clean apparel print. Use a high-contrast, vector art aesthetic with crisp, solid lines and flat color blocks. Focus on elegant silhouettes and abstract celestial forms (galaxies, orbits, stylized comets). Highly graphic, clean symmetry, maximalist negative space, minimalist detail.
